m365-105.attackPerspective: When "Ensure Information Protection sensitivity label policies are published." is not properly configured, attackers can operate without detection, leading to complete environment compromise, data exfiltration, and persistent backdoor access. Without proper logging, attackers operate undetected, extending dwell time from hours to months. In incident response, the absence of logs is the single biggest factor that extends investigation time and prevents accurate scoping of a breach.
m365-105.implementationNotes:
